creator: TsurutaniNaoki@gmail.com
text:
building japanese/xyaku fails.

Fix: 

i have no idea.
How-To-Repeat: 	% cd /usr/ports/japanese/xyaku
	% make
	...
	mkdir .libs
	cc -Wall -O -pipe -o xyaku addin.o cache.o event.o exec.o main.o mem.o xcomm.o xpopup.o  -L/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libXt.so /usr/local/lib/libSM.so /usr/local/lib/libICE.so /usr/local/lib/libXext.so /usr/local/lib/libX11.so /usr/local/lib/libxcb-xlib.so /usr/local/lib/libxcb.so /usr/local/lib/libXau.so /usr/local/lib/libXdmcp.so /usr/local/lib/libpthread-stubs.so -lrpcsvc glib-1.2.8/libhashfromglib.a   -Wl,--rpath -Wl,/usr/local/lib -Wl,--rpath -Wl,/usr/local/lib
	Making all in addin
	cd . && automake --gnu --include-deps Makefile
	Usage: autoconf [-h] [--help] [-m dir] [--macrodir=dir]
	       [-l dir] [--localdir=dir] [--version] [template-file]
